name: Choose your destination
description:
This room is completely clean and very well illuminated, the lights came from
everywhere and you soon perceive that was a magical power in this place.  You
can see three doors, each one with a grooving skull and a inscription that you
do not have difficulties to read:
&n
&W     "Three ways to choose:&n
&n
&W              One to come back without knowing&n
&W              One to follow without knowing&n
&W              One to die and never to know"&n
